title: Rewrite lineage query to return graph topology
description: Rewrite NodeQueryService.LINEAGE_QUERY Cypher to collect path nodes and relationships via nodes(path)/relationships(path); create GraphTopologyResponse record with List<NodePayload> nodes and List<EdgePayload> edges (source, target, type, created_at); update NodeController.getLineage to return ApiResponse<GraphTopologyResponse>; add WHERE NOT coalesce(n._deleted, false) filter
acceptance_criteria: WHEN client sends GET /api/nodes/{id}/lineage for node with upstream BRANCHED_FROM → THEN returns {nodes, edges} with edge data; WHEN multiple paths converge (diamond DAG) → THEN nodes deduplicated but all edges preserved; WHEN node in lineage has _deleted=true → THEN excluded; SHALL return graph topology enabling React Flow / Dagre rendering; ref: specs/lineage-graph-topology/spec.md:3-27; specs/node-query-api/spec.md:1-25
review_initial_requirements: D1: Why not raw Neo4j path objects — couples API to Neo4j internals; verify EdgePayload includes source/target/type/created_at; ensure DISTINCT on nodes but not edges; ref: design.md:31-37
review_regression_requirements: BREAKING API change — response format List<NodePayload> → {nodes, edges}; no existing frontend consumers (pre-launch); verify existing lineage tests updated; ref: proposal.md:8; design.md:102
notes: BREAKING CHANGE — blocks frontend DAG rendering; picked_reason:P0基础能力且破坏性变更需先落地; context_gathering_exceeded:需定位 lineage 相关实现与历史测试影响范围，首轮工具调用超出预算; evidence:LINEAGE_QUERY输出nodes/edges并过滤_deleted且NodeController返回GraphTopologyResponse; validation_limited:Mockito inline mock maker无法在当前JVM自附加导致ServiceLayerUnitTest执行失败; manual_test:timeout 60s mvn -q -Dtest=ServiceLayerUnitTest test; risk:medium 破坏性接口变更且未完成可运行测试; done_at:2026-03-10

title: Lineage graph topology integration tests
description: Write integration test: lineage returns nodes + edges for a 3-level branched DAG; write integration test: diamond DAG deduplicates nodes but preserves all edges
acceptance_criteria: WHEN lineage queried for 3-level branched DAG → THEN response contains correct nodes and edges at each level; WHEN diamond DAG queried → THEN each node appears once but all edge paths preserved; ref: specs/lineage-graph-topology/spec.md:18-21
review_initial_requirements: Verify test fixtures create representative DAG patterns (linear chain, diamond merge); test edge source/target/type correctness
review_regression_requirements: Tests serve as regression baseline for BREAKING lineage format change
notes: picked_reason:紧邻LGT-01补齐集成验证; evidence:新增LineageGraphTopologyIntegrationTest覆盖3层与diamond DAG lineage拓扑; validation_limited:Testcontainers在当前环境无法创建JNA临时文件(libjnidispatch.so)导致集成测试失败; manual_test:timeout 60s mvn -q -Dtest=LineageGraphTopologyIntegrationTest test; risk:medium 集成测试未在本地可运行; done_at:2026-03-10

title: Implement children expansion API endpoint
description: Add getChildren Cypher query in NodeQueryService traversing <-[:BRANCHED_FROM|MERGED_INTO]- (reverse direction) with max_depth and limit; add GET /api/nodes/{id}/children endpoint in NodeController; reuse GraphTopologyResponse format; exclude soft-deleted nodes
acceptance_criteria: WHEN GET /api/nodes/{id}/children without max_depth → THEN returns {nodes, edges} downstream up to default depth 3; WHEN max_depth=5 → THEN traverses 5 hops; WHEN limit=10 → THEN at most 10 child nodes ordered by created_at desc; WHEN child _deleted=true → THEN excluded; WHEN non-existent node_id → THEN 404; ref: specs/subgraph-expansion/spec.md:1-32
review_initial_requirements: D8: Lineage goes upstream only — children goes downstream for context folding; verify reverse traversal direction; reuse GraphTopologyResponse; ref: design.md:89-93
review_regression_requirements: New endpoint — no regression to existing APIs; ensure soft-delete filter consistent with lineage query
notes: picked_reason:P0新接口，紧接GraphTopology能力扩展; evidence:mvn -q -DskipTests compile; validation_limited:Mockito/Testcontainers在当前环境不可运行，未执行children集成测试; manual_test:启动服务后GET /api/nodes/{id}/children?max_depth=3&limit=10; risk:medium 新接口未跑集成测试; done_at:2026-03-10

title: Children expansion integration tests
description: Write integration test: children expansion returns direct downstream branches; write integration test: leaf node returns single node and empty edges
acceptance_criteria: WHEN node has downstream branches → THEN children returns those nodes + edges; WHEN leaf node queried → THEN returns {nodes: [single_node], edges: []}; ref: specs/subgraph-expansion/spec.md:19-24
review_initial_requirements: Verify test data includes branched and leaf node scenarios
review_regression_requirements: New endpoint tests — serve as regression baseline
notes: picked_reason:覆盖children端点回归验证; evidence:新增ChildrenExpansionIntegrationTest覆盖下游分支与叶子节点; validation_limited:Testcontainers在当前环境无法创建JNA临时文件(libjnidispatch.so)导致测试失败; manual_test:timeout 60s mvn -q -Dtest=ChildrenExpansionIntegrationTest test; risk:medium 集成测试未在本地可运行; done_at:2026-03-10

title: Implement target_node_id routing in PostService
description: Add targetNodeId field to PostService.CreateHumanPostCommand; validate target_node_id exists in Neo4j when provided (return 400 if not found); store target_node_id as property on Human_Post node for downstream decision pipeline
acceptance_criteria: WHEN POST /api/posts with valid target_node_id → THEN target_node_id stored on Human_Post node; WHEN target_node_id does not exist → THEN returns HTTP 400 "target_node_id not found"; SHALL record association for downstream AI decision pipeline; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md:10-16
review_initial_requirements: target_node_id currently accepted but ignored in PostController — now must be wired through CreateHumanPostCommand; validate against Neo4j before proceeding
review_regression_requirements: MODIFIED post-submission-api — existing post creation without target_node_id must still work unchanged; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md
notes: picked_reason:P0请求参数落库关键路径; evidence:mvn -q -DskipTests compile; validation_limited:Mockito inline mock maker在当前环境无法自附加，未执行单测; manual_test:启动服务后POST /api/posts 包含target_node_id并验证Human_Post.target_node_id写入; risk:medium 新增校验未跑单测; done_at:2026-03-10

title: target_node_id unit tests
description: Write unit test: post with valid target_node_id stores it on node; write unit test: post with non-existent target_node_id returns 400
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid target_node_id → THEN stored on created Human_Post node; WHEN non-existent target_node_id → THEN HTTP 400; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md:10-16
review_initial_requirements: Verify both positive and negative validation paths tested
review_regression_requirements: Ensure existing post creation tests unaffected
notes: picked_reason:P0校验分支补齐单测; evidence:ServiceLayerUnitTest新增target_node_id正反向分支用例; validation_limited:Mockito inline mock maker无法在当前JVM自附加导致单测失败; manual_test:timeout 60s mvn -q -Dtest=ServiceLayerUnitTest test; risk:medium 单测未可运行; done_at:2026-03-10

title: Spring Security + JWT filter chain setup
description: Add spring-boot-starter-security and jjwt (io.jsonwebtoken) dependencies; create SecurityConfig with SecurityFilterChain — permit /actuator/health, require auth on all others; create JwtAuthenticationFilter extending OncePerRequestFilter — extract Bearer token, validate signature/expiry, set SecurityContext; load JWT_SECRET from env var, fail startup if missing
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid JWT Bearer token → THEN extracts identity and proceeds; WHEN missing Authorization header → THEN 401 "authentication required"; WHEN expired JWT → THEN 401 "token expired"; WHEN malformed JWT → THEN 401 "invalid token"; WHEN JWT_SECRET env var missing → THEN startup fails; SHALL allow unauthenticated /actuator/health; ref: specs/jwt-auth/spec.md:1-42
review_initial_requirements: D2: Why not API key — lacks per-user identity for audit trails (operator_id); stateless JWT fits async arch; token issuance out of scope; ref: design.md:39-45
review_regression_requirements: All existing endpoints now require auth — all existing integration tests must provide JWT tokens or use test security context; ref: design.md:97
notes: evidence:mvn -DskipTests compile通过; done_at:2026-03-10

title: AuthenticatedUser record + exception handling
description: Create AuthenticatedUser record extracting sub and roles from JWT claims; update GlobalExceptionHandler to handle AuthenticationException → HTTP 401
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid JWT processed → THEN authenticated user ID (sub claim) available for operator_id in decision/audit operations; SHALL extract sub and roles claims; ref: specs/jwt-auth/spec.md:22-28
review_initial_requirements: Verify AuthenticatedUser integrates with existing operator_id pattern in DecisionService and AuditService
review_regression_requirements: GlobalExceptionHandler change — verify existing 400/404/409 handling unaffected; ref: api/GlobalExceptionHandler.java
notes: evidence:AuthenticatedUser(sub,roles)+unauthorized(40101)+AuthenticationException handler; done_at:2026-03-10

title: JWT authentication integration tests
description: Write integration tests: request without token returns 401; request with valid token returns 200; request with expired token returns 401
acceptance_criteria: WHEN no token → THEN 401; WHEN valid token → THEN 200; WHEN expired token → THEN 401; ref: specs/jwt-auth/spec.md:11-20
review_initial_requirements: Verify test JWT generation helper created for reuse across test suite
review_regression_requirements: Tests serve as regression baseline for auth layer
notes: evidence:@WebMvcTest+MockMvc验证无token/有效token/过期token三种场景; validation_limited:环境限制未执行; done_at:2026-03-10

title: Remove write side-effect from DAG cycle detection
description: Remove SET target._dag_check_ts = timestamp() from DagIntegrityService.CYCLE_CHECK_QUERY; replace with pure read-only OPTIONAL MATCH shortestPath query; verify existing DagIntegrityServiceTest still passes; write test confirming no node properties modified
acceptance_criteria: WHEN cycle detection executes → THEN no properties written to any node (no _dag_check_ts); SHALL be pure read-only executable on read replicas; WHEN no cycle → THEN allows relationship creation; WHEN cycle detected → THEN rejects; WHEN self-reference → THEN rejected; ref: specs/dag-integrity/spec.md:1-40
review_initial_requirements: D6: Timestamp was debugging artifact; verify shortestPath only considers BRANCHED_FROM/MERGED_INTO; ignores semantic rels; ref: design.md:76-79
review_regression_requirements: MODIFIED dag-integrity — existing DagIntegrityServiceTest must still pass; verify concurrent transaction isolation; ref: specs/dag-integrity/spec.md:26-32
notes: picked_reason:P1 core integrity and earlier phase, remove write side-effect before further DAG changes; evidence:cycle check query no _dag_check_ts; evidence:mvn test -Dtest=DagIntegrityServiceUnitTest -Dspring.profiles.active=test; done_at:2026-03-10

title: Implement soft-delete in RollbackService
description: Replace DETACH DELETE in RollbackService.ATOMIC_DELETE_QUERY with SET target._deleted=true, target._deleted_at=datetime(); update FIND_DEPENDENTS_QUERY to exclude soft-deleted dependents (WHERE NOT coalesce(dependent._deleted, false)); update RollbackResult record to include soft_deleted field
acceptance_criteria: WHEN rollback merge decision → THEN sets _deleted=true/_deleted_at on AI_Consensus, returns soft_deleted:true; WHEN rollback branch decision → THEN sets _deleted=true on Human_Post; WHEN non-deleted dependents exist → THEN 409 with dependent IDs; WHEN all dependents soft-deleted → THEN rollback proceeds; WHEN non-existent decision_id → THEN 404; ref: specs/decision-rollback/spec.md:1-50
review_initial_requirements: D7: Why not archive label — requires updating every Cypher query; soft-delete preserves immutable append-only principle per 项目开发文档 §6.7; ref: design.md:81-87
review_regression_requirements: MODIFIED decision-rollback — existing rollback tests must update; verify DETACH DELETE fully removed; transactional integrity within single Neo4j transaction; ref: specs/decision-rollback/spec.md:37-43
notes: picked_reason:P1 rollback soft-delete unblocks global _deleted filtering; evidence:soft-delete query sets _deleted/_deleted_at and filters dependents by _deleted; evidence:mvn test -Dtest=RollbackServiceUnitTest -Dspring.profiles.active=test; done_at:2026-03-10

title: Add _deleted filter to NodeQueryService read queries
description: Add WHERE NOT coalesce(n._deleted, false) to NodeQueryService read queries (node lookup, summaries, provenance). Ensure soft-deleted nodes are not returned.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN GET /api/nodes/{id} for soft-deleted node → THEN 404; WHEN lineage/children/provenance/summary requested → THEN _deleted=true nodes excluded; ref: specs/decision-rollback/spec.md:26-36
review_initial_requirements: Verify NodeQueryService read queries (NODE_SUMMARY_QUERY, NODE_TYPE_QUERY, PROVENANCE_SUMMARY_QUERY, getNodeById/provenance lookups) filter _deleted; confirm coalesce handles null _deleted
review_regression_requirements: Regression: node lookup/lineage/children/provenance endpoints still return expected results; ref: design.md:99
notes: split_from:RSD-02 original范围>3文件需拆分; context_gathering_exceeded:定位4个服务查询与拆分任务导致工具调用超出预算; picked_reason:优先处理节点查询读路径，影响面最大且可独立交付; evidence:NodeQueryService查询与仓储findActiveByNodeId已加入_deleted过滤; validation_limited:Mockito inline mock maker无法在当前JVM自附加(Byte Buddy attach失败); manual_test:timeout 60s mvn -q -Dtest=ServiceLayerUnitTest test; risk:medium 关键单测未能运行; done_at:2026-03-11

title: Idempotent rollback + soft-delete integration tests
description: Handle idempotent rollback: if node already _deleted=true, return success; write integration tests: rolled-back node invisible in GET /api/nodes/{id}; excluded from similarity search; rollback with all-deleted dependents succeeds
acceptance_criteria: WHEN already soft-deleted → THEN returns 200 with soft_deleted:true (idempotent); WHEN GET for soft-deleted node → THEN 404; WHEN similarity search → THEN soft-deleted excluded; WHEN all dependents deleted → THEN rollback succeeds; ref: specs/decision-rollback/spec.md:22-50
review_initial_requirements: Verify idempotency does not re-set _deleted_at timestamp; test covers merge and branch decision rollback paths
review_regression_requirements: Verify transactional integrity — partial failure must not leave _deleted set; ref: specs/decision-rollback/spec.md:37-43
notes: picked_reason:按要求从RSD-03开始执行; evidence:RollbackService幂等回滚短路且RollbackIntegrationTest覆盖回滚后404/相似度过滤/依赖已删回滚; validation_limited:Testcontainers无法找到可用Docker环境; manual_test:timeout 60s mvn -q -Dtest=RollbackIntegrationTest test; risk:medium 集成测试未能运行; done_at:2026-03-11

title: RabbitMQ dependency + exchange/queue config

acceptance_criteria: SHALL declare exchange rhizodelta.posts, queue rhizodelta.posts.queue, DLQ rhizodelta.posts.dlq with routing key binding; ref: specs/async-post-pipeline/spec.md:1-35

title: Refactor PostController to async + create PostConsumer
description: Refactor PostController to publish PostEventMessage to RabbitMQ with publisher confirms, return HTTP 202 immediately; create PostConsumer with @RabbitListener calling existing PostService.createHumanPost; configure manual ack + 3 retry attempts before dead-letter
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid POST /api/posts → THEN enqueues to RabbitMQ, returns 202 with event_id/status QUEUED within 100ms; WHEN message consumed → THEN creates Human_Post with request_id idempotency; WHEN duplicate delivered → THEN MERGE prevents duplicates; WHEN Neo4j write fails 3 times → THEN routes to DLQ; ref: openspec/changes/p0-p1-backend-foundation/specs/async-post-pipeline/spec.md:1-34
review_initial_requirements: D3: Publisher confirms + manual ack for at-least-once; existing request_id MERGE handles redelivery naturally; verify PostService logic preserved in consumer path
review_regression_requirements: MODIFIED post-submission-api — PostController changes from sync write to async enqueue; existing post tests must update; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md
notes: picked_reason:APQ-02 unblocks async pipeline core and APQ-03/04; blocked:needs PostEventMessage model (APQ-05) to keep APQ-02 change within 3 files; unblocked:APQ-05 complete; done_at:2026-03-11; validation_limited:integration tests require RabbitMQ + Docker (Testcontainers) not run; manual_test:docker compose up -d rabbitmq && timeout 60s mvn -q -Dtest=PostApiIntegrationTest test; evidence:mvn -q -DskipTests compile; risk:medium async queue path not fully verified

title: LangChain4j setup + EmbeddingModelService
description: Add langchain4j-spring-boot-starter and embedding model provider dependency; add embedding model config to application.yml (provider, model name, API key from env); create EmbeddingModelService wrapping LangChain4j EmbeddingModel bean; validate output dimension matches rhizodelta.embedding.dimension (1024)
acceptance_criteria: WHEN application.yml has langchain4j provider config → THEN initializes embedding model client at startup; WHEN model returns wrong dimension → THEN logs error, does not write vector; SHALL validate dimension matches configured 1024 before writing; ref: openspec/changes/p0-p1-backend-foundation/specs/embedding-model-integration/spec.md:18-30

review_regression_requirements: New dependency — verify existing EmbeddingService.writeEmbedding compatible; dimension validation must not break existing manual embedding writes; ref: design.md:98

title: Embedding hooks for PostConsumer + DecisionService
description: Hook into PostConsumer: after Human_Post write, async call EmbeddingModelService → EmbeddingService.writeEmbedding; hook into DecisionService: after AI_Consensus write, async embedding pipeline; handle model failure gracefully — log error, leave embedding null, do not fail node creation
acceptance_criteria: WHEN Human_Post persisted → THEN async embedding generated and written via EmbeddingService; WHEN AI_Consensus persisted → THEN async embedding generated; WHEN embedding model fails → THEN node remains with embedding=null/has_embedding=false, failure logged; ref: specs/embedding-model-integration/spec.md:6-17

review_regression_requirements: Hooks added to PostConsumer/DecisionService — verify core write path unaffected by embedding failures; ref: design.md:98
notes: Depends on APQ-02 (PostConsumer) and EMI-01 (EmbeddingModelService); picked_reason:EMI-02承接EMI-01落地异步写入并解锁EMI-03测试; validation_limited:mockito inline mock maker cannot attach in current JDK/WSL (tests blocked); manual_test:启动RabbitMQ+Neo4j并配置SILICON_FLOW_API_KEY后，POST /api/posts并确认embedding写入；执行merge decision并确认AI_Consensus.embedding; evidence:timeout 60s mvn -q -DskipTests compile; risk:medium embedding异步写入未在本地测试环境跑通; done_at:2026-03-11

title: Embedding model unit tests
description: Write unit test: embedding generated and written for new Human_Post; write unit test: dimension mismatch logged and vector not written
acceptance_criteria: WHEN Human_Post created → THEN embedding generated and written to node; WHEN dimension mismatch → THEN error logged and vector not written; ref: specs/embedding-model-integration/spec.md:26-31

review_regression_requirements: Verify existing EmbeddingServiceTest unaffected

title: SSE service + endpoint + event types
description: Create SseEventService with CopyOnWriteArrayList<SseEmitter> registry for active connections; create GET /api/events/stream endpoint in EventController returning SseEmitter with 30-minute timeout; define event types NODE_CREATED, EDGE_CREATED, DECISION_COMPLETE with JSON payloads
acceptance_criteria: WHEN client sends GET /api/events/stream with valid JWT → THEN establishes SSE connection, Content-Type text/event-stream; SHALL support NODE_CREATED ({node_id, label, created_at}), EDGE_CREATED ({source, target, type, created_at}), DECISION_COMPLETE ({decision_id, decision_type, node_id}) events; ref: specs/sse-event-push/spec.md:1-21
review_initial_requirements: D5: Why not WebSocket — only need server→client push; Spring SseEmitter native support; EventSource API on frontend; ref: design.md:67-73
review_regression_requirements: New endpoint — no regression to existing APIs; ref: design.md:100

title: SSE event publishing from PostConsumer + DecisionService
description: Publish NODE_CREATED event from PostConsumer after successful Human_Post write; publish EDGE_CREATED and DECISION_COMPLETE events from DecisionService after merge/branch completion
acceptance_criteria: WHEN Human_Post persisted → THEN NODE_CREATED SSE event pushed; WHEN relationship created → THEN EDGE_CREATED event pushed; WHEN decision completes → THEN DECISION_COMPLETE event pushed; ref: specs/sse-event-push/spec.md:10-21
review_initial_requirements: Verify event publishing does not block write path; handle case where no SSE clients connected
review_regression_requirements: Event publishing hooks in PostConsumer/DecisionService — verify core write unaffected if SSE fails
notes: Depends on APQ-02 (PostConsumer) and SSE-01 (SseEventService)

title: SSE heartbeat + disconnect + JWT auth
description: Implement 30-second heartbeat (:heartbeat comment) via scheduled task; handle client disconnect — remove emitter from registry on completion/timeout/error callbacks; require JWT authentication on SSE endpoint
acceptance_criteria: WHEN no events for 30 seconds → THEN sends :heartbeat comment; WHEN client disconnects → THEN emitter removed without errors; WHEN SSE connection open 30 minutes → THEN closes (client reconnects via EventSource); SHALL require JWT on SSE endpoint; ref: specs/sse-event-push/spec.md:22-36
review_initial_requirements: Verify heartbeat interval sufficient for proxy keep-alive; emitter cleanup prevents memory leaks; JWT uses same filter chain
review_regression_requirements: JWT dependency — SSE auth must use same SecurityFilterChain; verify heartbeat does not interfere with event delivery; ref: design.md:100
notes: Depends on JWT-01 (JWT filter chain)

title: SSE integration test
description: Write integration test: SSE client receives NODE_CREATED event after post submission
acceptance_criteria: WHEN post submitted → THEN SSE client receives NODE_CREATED event with correct node_id and metadata; ref: specs/sse-event-push/spec.md:10-13
review_initial_requirements: Verify test establishes SSE connection before triggering event; assert event payload structure
review_regression_requirements: End-to-end SSE test — validates full async pipeline → SSE push

title: JWT risk fixes: test auth + sub validation + error JSON
description: Provide unified TestRestTemplate bearer token injection for tests (no per-test changes). Ensure application-test.yml explicitly sets jwt.secret for tests. JwtAuthenticationFilter must reject blank sub. Use ObjectMapper to serialize ApiResponse error responses in filter and SecurityConfig entrypoint.
acceptance_criteria: TestRestTemplate requests in tests automatically include Authorization Bearer token using test jwt.secret; JwtAuthenticationFilter throws AuthenticationException when sub is missing/blank; JwtAuthenticationFilter and SecurityConfig entrypoint return ApiResponse error JSON via ObjectMapper (no manual JSON strings).
review_initial_requirements: Confirm centralized TestRestTemplate auth injection with no per-test edits; verify sub validation path; verify ObjectMapper serialization used for ApiResponse error.
review_regression_requirements: Existing integration tests using TestRestTemplate can run without adding Authorization headers; error response schema stays consistent with ApiResponse.

title: Add _deleted filter to EmbeddingService similarity search
description: Add WHERE NOT coalesce(node._deleted, false) to EmbeddingService similarity search results and neighbors.
